description_long: This is a round wall clock designed to resemble a vinyl record, featuring a black face with white silhouettes of four figures in dynamic poses and the text 'THE BEATLES' prominently displayed at the top. The center of the clock mimics a record label in red and gold, adding to the retro aesthetic. The clock hands are gold-colored, with a traditional three-hand configuration for hours, minutes, and seconds. The back of the clock reveals a battery compartment and mounting hardware, indicating it is powered by a standard clock mechanism. The edge profile is slim, with the clock face and mechanism protruding only slightly from the wall. The overall design is both decorative and functional, making it a statement piece for music enthusiasts.
description: A round, vinyl record-inspired wall clock with 'THE BEATLES' text, white silhouettes, and gold hands, featuring a red and gold center label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full clock face, 'THE BEATLES' text, white silhouettes, gold hands, and the red center label.
description_view_1: Side profile view displaying the slim thickness of the clock and the protruding clock mechanism at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the battery compartment, mounting hardware, and mirrored text and silhouettes from the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view, again highlighting the thinness and the clock mechanism's depth.
attribute_face_design: Round black face styled as a vinyl record, with white silhouettes, 'THE BEATLES' text, and a red and gold center label.
